query:
SELECT cp.projectId, MIN(c.name) as name, MIN(c.title) as title, MIN(c.company) as company
FROM contacts c
JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.contactId = c.id
WHERE cp.projectId IN ('690089','360011','570022','570020','720037','570013','180005','690075')
  AND c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready'
  AND c.crmOrphan = 0
  AND c.rejectedAt IS NULL
GROUP BY cp.projectId;
